mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.title, t.user_id, u.name AS user_name, t.type, t.category, t.workflow, t.priority, t.planned_end, t.progress, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task_watcher w WHERE w.task_id = t.id AND w.user_id = #{userId}) AS isWatch FROM task t JOIN users u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.project_id = #{projectId}
SELECT p.user_id AS id, u.name FROM project_member p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.project_id = #{projectId}
SELECT group_value AS cgroup, com_value AS id, com_name AS name FROM common_code

{ CALL proc_insert_task( #{projectId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{versionId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workflow, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{priority, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{plannedStart, mode=IN, jdbcType=DATE}, #{plannedEnd, mode=IN, jdbcType=DATE}, #{actualStart, mode=IN, jdbcType=DATE}, #{actualEnd, mode=IN, jdbcType=DATE}, #{estimatedTime, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{progress, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{parentId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isPublic, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creator, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileDetails, mode=IN, jdbcType=ARRAY, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.FileDetailTypeHandler}, #{id, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }

{ CALL GET_TASK_DETAIL( #{id, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{versionId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workflow, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{priority, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reject, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{plannedStart, mode=OUT, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{plannedEnd, mode=OUT, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{actualStart, mode=OUT, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{actualEnd, mode=OUT, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{estimatedTime, mode=OUT, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{progress, mode=OUT, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{parentId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentName, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isPublic, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creator, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{journalList, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=journalResultMap, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.CursorTypeHandler}, #{timeList, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=timeResultMap, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.CursorTypeHandler}, #{replyList, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=replyResultMap, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.CursorTypeHandler}, #{fileList, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=fileResultMap, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.CursorTypeHandler}, #{childTaskList, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=childResultMap, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.CursorTypeHandler}, #{linkedTaskList,mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=linkedResultMap, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.CursorTypeHandler} ) }
mapper.insert:
SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('task_reply') FROM dual
INSERT INTO task_reply(id, task_id, user_id, content, created_on, parent_id) VALUES(#{id}, #{taskId}, #{userId}, #{content}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{parentId})
